title: Kiki's Delivery Service
tmdbOverview: A young witch, on her mandatory year of independent life, finds fitting into a new community difficult while she supports herself by running an air courier service.
synopsis: Kiki's Delivery Service (1989) is a animation, family and fantasy film from Japan. It holds a solid 7.8 rating on IMDb. A standout of 1980s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a G certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
